003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.

015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.cbor;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020
021import java.io.*;
022import java.math.*;
023
024import org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream.*;
025
026/**
027 * Reference implementation of the public {@link TokenWriter} surface for the CBOR format
028 * (RFC 8949).
029 *
030 * <p>
031 * Wraps a {@link CborOutputStream} and emits **indefinite-length** containers
032 * (<c>0xBF</c> for maps, <c>0x9F</c> for arrays, terminated by <c>0xFF</c> BREAK) so that the
033 * caller doesn't have to know element counts up front &mdash; a natural fit for streaming
034 * generation.
035 *
036 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
037 *    <li class='warn'>This class is not thread safe.
038 *    <li>{@code byte[]} values dispatch to native CBOR major-type-2 byte strings via
039 *       {@link CborOutputStream#appendBinary(byte[])}, not to a base64 string fallback.
040 *    <li>The writer is purely structural; object swaps and {@code @Schema} annotations are NOT
041 *       applied at the token layer (see {@link TokenWriter#object(Object)} for the bridge that
042 *       does apply them).
043 * </ul>
044 */
045@SuppressWarnings({
046   "resource" // The writer's underlying OutputStream is owned by the caller via try-with-resources on the writer itself; Eclipse JDT flags the inner stream as unclosed but that's by design.
047})
048public class CborTokenWriter implements TokenWriter {
049
050   /**
051    * Cursor-level settings honored by {@link CborTokenWriter}.
052    *
053    * @param walk The {@link org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream.PojoWalker.Options walk options} used by
054    *    {@link #object(Object)} when walking a value graph.
055    */
056   public record Settings(PojoWalker.Options walk) {
057
058      /** Default canonical setting: default walk options. */
059      public static final Settings DEFAULT = new Settings(PojoWalker.Options.DEFAULT);
060   }
061
062   private final CborOutputStream out;
063   private final OutputStream raw;
064   private final Closeable owned;
065   private final Settings settings;
066
067   // Container stack: 0 = array, 1 = map; tracked depth lets us validate end-kind matches.
068   private boolean[] stackIsMap = new boolean[16];
069   private int depth;
070   // Map state: track whether we're emitting a key (true) or a value (false) at the current
071   // map level.
072   private boolean[] stackAwaitingKey = new boolean[16];
073
074   private boolean closed;
075
076   /**
077    * Constructor with default settings.
078    *
079    * @param out The {@link OutputStream} to emit CBOR to.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
080    */
081   public CborTokenWriter(OutputStream out) {
082      this(out, null, Settings.DEFAULT);
083   }
084
085   /**
086    * Constructor with explicit settings.
087    *
088    * @param out The {@link OutputStream} to emit CBOR to.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
089    * @param settings The settings.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
090    */
091   public CborTokenWriter(OutputStream out, Settings settings) {
092      this(out, null, settings);
093   }
094
095   private CborTokenWriter(OutputStream out, Closeable owned, Settings settings) {
096      assertArgNotNull("out", out);
097      assertArgNotNull("settings", settings);
098      this.raw = out;
099      this.out = new CborOutputStream(out);
100      this.owned = owned;
101      this.settings = settings;
102   }
103
104   /**
105    * Internal factory used by {@link CborSerializerSession#serializeTokens(Object)} to coerce
106    * supported output types ({@link OutputStream}, {@link File}) to a CBOR writer.
107    *
108    * @param output The output object.
109    * @param settings The settings.
110    * @return A new {@link CborTokenWriter}.
111    * @throws IOException If the output type is not supported or could not be opened.
112    */
113   public static CborTokenWriter forOutput(Object output, Settings settings) throws IOException {
114      if (output == null)
115         throw new IOException("Output cannot be null.");
116      if (output instanceof OutputStream os)
117         return new CborTokenWriter(os, null, settings);
118      if (output instanceof File f) {
119         var os = new BufferedOutputStream(new FileOutputStream(f));
120         return new CborTokenWriter(os, os, settings);
121      }
122      throw new IOException("Cannot convert object of type " + output.getClass().getName() + " to an OutputStream.");
123   }
124
125   @Override /* TokenWriter */
126   public TokenWriter startObject() throws IOException {
127      assertOpen();
128      preValueWrite();
129      // 0xBF = indefinite-length map start.
130      raw.write(0xBF);
131      pushContainer(true);
132      return this;
133   }
134
135   @Override /* TokenWriter */
136   public TokenWriter endObject() throws IOException {
137      assertOpen();
138      popContainer(true);
139      // 0xFF = BREAK (closes both indefinite arrays and maps).
140      raw.write(0xFF);
141      afterValue();
142      return this;
143   }
144
145   @Override /* TokenWriter */
146   public TokenWriter startArray() throws IOException {
147      assertOpen();
148      preValueWrite();
149      // 0x9F = indefinite-length array start.
150      raw.write(0x9F);
151      pushContainer(false);
152      return this;
153   }
154
155   @Override /* TokenWriter */
156   public TokenWriter endArray() throws IOException {
157      assertOpen();
158      popContainer(false);
159      raw.write(0xFF);
160      afterValue();
161      return this;
162   }
163
164   @Override /* TokenWriter */
165   public TokenWriter fieldName(String name) throws IOException {
166      assertOpen();
167      assertArgNotNull("name", name);
168      if (depth == 0 || !stackIsMap[depth - 1])
169         throw new IllegalStateException("field called outside an object");
170      if (!stackAwaitingKey[depth - 1])
171         throw new IllegalStateException("field called twice without an intervening value");
172      out.appendString(name);
173      stackAwaitingKey[depth - 1] = false;
174      return this;
175   }
176
177   @Override /* TokenWriter */
178   public TokenWriter string(String value) throws IOException {
179      assertOpen();
180      if (value == null)
181         return nil();
182      preValueWrite();
183      out.appendString(value);
184      afterValue();
185      return this;
186   }
187
188   @Override /* TokenWriter */
189   public TokenWriter number(Number value) throws IOException {
190      assertOpen();
191      if (value == null)
192         return nil();
193      preValueWrite();
194      out.appendNumber(value);
195      afterValue();
196      return this;
197   }
198
199   @Override /* TokenWriter */
200   public TokenWriter number(long value) throws IOException {
201      assertOpen();
202      preValueWrite();
203      out.appendLong(value);
204      afterValue();
205      return this;
206   }
207
208   @Override /* TokenWriter */
209   public TokenWriter number(double value) throws IOException {
210      assertOpen();
211      preValueWrite();
212      out.appendDouble(value);
213      afterValue();
214      return this;
215   }
216
217   @Override /* TokenWriter */
218   public TokenWriter number(BigDecimal value) throws IOException {
219      assertOpen();
220      if (value == null)
221         return nil();
222      preValueWrite();
223      out.appendDouble(value.doubleValue());
224      afterValue();
225      return this;
226   }
227
228   @Override /* TokenWriter */
229   public TokenWriter number(BigInteger value) throws IOException {
230      assertOpen();
231      if (value == null)
232         return nil();
233      preValueWrite();
234      // Delegates to appendNumber so values outside the signed-long range are emitted losslessly
235      // (native CBOR integer up to ±2^64, decimal string beyond) rather than throwing on overflow.
236      out.appendNumber(value);
237      afterValue();
238      return this;
239   }
240
241   @Override /* TokenWriter */
242   public TokenWriter bool(boolean value) throws IOException {
243      assertOpen();
244      preValueWrite();
245      out.appendBoolean(value);
246      afterValue();
247      return this;
248   }
249
250   @Override /* TokenWriter */
251   public TokenWriter nil() throws IOException {
252      assertOpen();
253      preValueWrite();
254      out.appendNull();
255      afterValue();
256      return this;
257   }
258
259   @Override /* TokenWriter */
260   public TokenWriter binary(byte[] value) throws IOException {
261      assertOpen();
262      if (value == null)
263         return nil();
264      preValueWrite();
265      out.appendBinary(value);
266      afterValue();
267      return this;
268   }
269
270   @Override /* TokenWriter */
271   public CborTokenWriter writeTag(long tagNumber) throws IOException {
272      assertOpen();
273      // A tag is a prefix on the next value emit; it does NOT consume a map-key/value or
274      // array-element slot.  Skip preValueWrite()/afterValue() — the wrapped value emit that
275      // follows owns the state transition.
276      out.writeTag(tagNumber);
277      return this;
278   }
279
280   @Override /* TokenWriter */
281   public CborTokenWriter writeSimple(int value) throws IOException {
282      assertOpen();
283      preValueWrite();
284      out.writeSimple(value);
285      afterValue();
286      return this;
287   }
288
289   @Override /* TokenWriter */
290   public TokenWriter object(Object value) throws IOException {
291      assertOpen();
292      PojoWalker.walk(this, value, settings.walk);
293      return this;
294   }
295
296   @Override /* TokenWriter */
297   public boolean isStreaming() {
298      return true;
299   }
300
301   @Override /* TokenWriter */
302   public void flush() throws IOException {
303      raw.flush();
304   }
305
306   @Override /* TokenWriter */
307   public void close() throws IOException {
308      if (closed)
309         return;
310      closed = true;
311      try {
312         raw.flush();
313      } finally {
314         if (owned != null)
315            owned.close();
316      }
317   }
318
319   // =================================================================================
320   // Helpers
321   // =================================================================================
322
323   /**
324    * Throws an {@link IOException} if this writer has been {@link #close() closed}.
325    *
326    * @throws IOException If this writer is closed.
327    */
328   private void assertOpen() throws IOException {
329      if (closed)
330         throw new IOException("Token writer is closed.");
331   }
332
333   private void preValueWrite() {
334      if (depth == 0)
335         return;
336      if (stackIsMap[depth - 1] && stackAwaitingKey[depth - 1])
337         throw new IllegalStateException(
338            "Value emitted at map-key position without preceding field(...).");
339   }
340
341   private void afterValue() {
342      if (depth == 0)
343         return;
344      if (stackIsMap[depth - 1])
345         stackAwaitingKey[depth - 1] = true;  // next emit inside this map should be a key
346   }
347
348   private void pushContainer(boolean isMap) {
349      if (depth == stackIsMap.length) {
350         var n = depth * 2;
351         var nm = new boolean[n];
352         var nk = new boolean[n];
353         System.arraycopy(stackIsMap, 0, nm, 0, depth);
354         System.arraycopy(stackAwaitingKey, 0, nk, 0, depth);
355         stackIsMap = nm;
356         stackAwaitingKey = nk;
357      }
358      stackIsMap[depth] = isMap;
359      stackAwaitingKey[depth] = isMap;  // map starts awaiting a key
360      depth++;
361   }
362
363   private void popContainer(boolean expectMap) {
364      if (depth == 0)
365         throw new IllegalStateException("end-container called with no matching start-container");
366      var actualIsMap = stackIsMap[depth - 1];
367      if (actualIsMap != expectMap)
368         throw new IllegalStateException(
369            "end-container kind mismatch: expected " + (expectMap ? "object" : "array") +
370            ", got " + (actualIsMap ? "object" : "array"));
371      depth--;
372   }
373}
